summary: Iteration 40 - Backup Monitoring Feature (Hornetsecurity VM Backup + Hyper-V). Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working. Auto-alert generation and auto-resolve working correctly.

backend_api: POST /api/backup/process-status - Receives backup data with X-API-Key header (200 OK)
POST /api/backup/process-status - Rejects requests without API key (401/403)
GET /api/backup/dashboard/{client_id} - Returns backup dashboard with VMs, summary, connection status (200 OK)
GET /api/backup/history/{client_id}?days=7 - Returns backup history for charts (200 OK)
GET /api/backup/history/{client_id} - Works with different day ranges (1, 7, 30)
GET /api/backup/vm/{client_id}/{vm_name} - Returns detailed VM backup info with alert history (200 OK)
GET /api/backup/summary-all - Returns backup summary across all clients (200 OK)
Auto-alert generation: Alert created for failed backup (backup_failure type)
Auto-resolve: Alert resolved when VM status changes to success
EXCHANGE-04 alert verified: created and auto-resolved correctly
frontend_ui: BackupPage loads at /backup with 'Monitoraggio Backup' title
Connection indicators show Altaro and Hyper-V status (green/red)
Summary cards display: VM Totali, Backup OK, Warning, Falliti, Mancanti
VM list shows all VMs with status badges (OK/Warning/Fallito)
VM rows are clickable and open detail modal
VM detail modal shows backup status, last backup time, size, type
VM detail modal shows STORICO ALERT BACKUP section with alert history
Resolved alerts show 'Risolto' timestamp in green
History chart displays stacked bar chart (Falliti, Mancanti, OK, Warning)
Sidebar shows 'Backup' navigation item under MONITORAGGIO section

critical_code_review_comments: backup.py: All endpoints implemented correctly with proper auth (Bearer token for dashboard/history/vm/summary-all, X-API-Key for process-status)
backup.py: Auto-alert generation works for failed/missing backups with correct severity (critical for failed, high for missing)
backup.py: Auto-resolve correctly marks alerts as resolved with resolved_at and resolved_by='auto'
backup.py: History cleanup keeps 30 days of data
BackupPage.js: All data-testid attributes present for testing
BackupPage.js: Italian language used throughout (Monitoraggio Backup, Fallito, Risolto, etc.)
BackupPage.js: Connection indicators show separate status for Altaro and Hyper-V
Layout.js: Backup navigation item correctly placed under MONITORAGGIO section
seed_data_creation: Backup test data created via POST /api/backup/process-status (EXCHANGE-04, DC-01, SQL-01 VMs with various statuses)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 40 verified the NEW Backup Monitoring feature. All backend endpoints working (13/13 tests). Frontend BackupPage fully functional with connection indicators, summary cards, VM list, detail modal, and history chart. Auto-alert generation creates backup_failure alerts for failed/missing backups. Auto-resolve marks alerts as resolved when VM backup succeeds. Test data includes EXCHANGE-04, DC-01, SQL-01 VMs.

mocked_apis.note: Backup data is simulated via process-status endpoint (as it would be in production from PowerShell connector)

auto_alert.description: Auto-generates backup_failure alerts for failed/missing backups

auto_resolve.description: Auto-resolves alerts when VM backup succeeds
